name: Smoky Salmon Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon.
2. Beat the cream cheese with lemon juice in an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the flaked salmon and green onions until thoroughly combined.
4. Season with liquid smoke to taste.
5. Chill several hours before serving to allow flavors to blend.
6. Serve on crackers or French bread rounds.
Makes 20 servings, about 2.5 cups.
